name: flow-immersive-mcp
description: MCP server for Flow Immersive 3D visualization — 46 tools for data analysis, network graphs, force layout, geographic mapping, anomaly detection, time series, NLP-to-viz, correlation, clustering, hierarchy, dataset comparison, pivot tables, regression, normalization, deduplication, histogram binning, transpose, sampling, statistics, computed columns, date parsing, string transforms, validation, missing value imputation, column rename/reorder, row filtering, dataset splitting, live data, and direct API integration. Browse 4000+ public flows, upload datasets, export standalone HTML 3D viewers.

scripts.ci: npm run build && npm test && npm run smoke-test

author: halyx
